title: Update descriptions in ccp*.json and hash_32.json to match reconciled FNV hash_32
description: Remove all 'computed via', placeholder strings, outdated project-LICHEN-eirg/vhvj refs. Use exact phrasing from ccp16.json/ccp15.json for consistency (FNV-1a32 basis 0x811c9dc5, matches lichen_hash_32 in lichen-core:28 and Python hash_32:30, independent oracle per test vector discipline). Update ccp16-hop.json:3 and similar. Run generator after.
